title: eryngium corniculatum
intro: Eryngium corniculatum, also known as snake-rescue or snake flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations, wounds, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting against bacterial and fungal infections. Eryngium corniculatum can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
